scripts.// mobile: Start Expo dev server for mobile app
scripts.// mobile:android: Build and run mobile app on Android emulator/device
scripts.// mobile:ios: Build and run mobile app on iOS simulator/device
scripts.// web: Start Next.js dev server for web app
scripts.// web:start: Start production web server (requires build first)
scripts.// dev: Start dev servers for all apps in parallel
scripts.// test:watch: Run tests in watch mode for TDD
scripts.// lint:fix: Auto-fix ESLint issues across all packages
scripts.// type-check: Run TypeScript type checking across all packages
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run check-deps && turbo run build lint type-check test --continue
scripts.// validate: Run all CI checks locally (format, check-deps, build, lint, type-check, test)
scripts.validate:changed: turbo run build lint type-check test --filter=...[HEAD~1] --continue
scripts.// validate:changed: Run CI checks only on packages affected by recent changes
scripts.// clean: Remove all node_modules and build artifacts
scripts.// reinstall: Clean install - useful for fixing dependency issues
scripts.db:generate-types: supabase gen types typescript --project-id ncewkeoohdkpbcovbppd > packages/shared-types/src/supabase.ts
scripts.// db:generate-types: Generate TypeScript types from remote Supabase schema (set SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID env var)
scripts.db:generate-types:staging: supabase gen types typescript --project-id ahbaeewecdeguxtxtvhr > packages/shared-types/src/supabase.ts
scripts.// db:generate-types:staging: Generate TypeScript types from staging Supabase schema
scripts.// db:generate-types:local: Generate TypeScript types from Supabase schema for local development
scripts.// db:studio: Start Supabase Studio for local database management
scripts.// db:reset: Reset local database to initial state
scripts.// db:seed: Run seed.sql to populate local database with test data (optional: SEED_EMAIL=user@example.com)
scripts.// db:seed:staging: Run seed.sql against staging Supabase (requires STAGING_DB_URL env var, optional: SEED_EMAIL)
scripts.// functions:serve: Sync Vault keys with edge runtime and start functions serve
scripts.// check-deps: Check for dependency conflicts across workspaces
scripts.// doctor: Check dev environment health (Node, npm, tools)
scripts.// create-package: Scaffold a new package in the monorepo
scripts.// audit-theme: Scan for hardcoded colors and missing theme hooks
scripts.// validate-i18n: Check translations for missing keys and mismatches
scripts.// ai-context: Generate fresh context summary for AI assistants
scripts.// deps:update: Check for outdated dependencies across all workspaces
scripts.// deps:upgrade: Upgrade all dependencies to latest versions
scripts.// turbo:graph: Visualize task dependency graph in browser
scripts.// turbo:dry: Preview what turbo will execute without running
scripts.// prepare: Set up Git hooks (runs automatically on npm install)
scripts.// lint-staged: Run linters on staged files (used by pre-commit hook)
